attacking_style: INEOS rarely attacks explosively; they prefer controlled tempo grinding on climbs to create separation through accumulated attrition rather than sudden accelerations.
team_tactics: Deploy domestiques to set sustained high pace on climbs, targeting specific time gaps. Defensive positioning in tactical danger zones (crosswinds), but reactive rather than proactive when race dynamics shift.
terrain_preference: Long, steady climbs where tempo control can accumulate fatigue advantages. Exposed in races requiring explosive punch or rapid tactical pivots from defensive to offensive positioning.
vulnerability: Unable to respond effectively when rivals attack explosively off their controlled pace. Struggle to convert from defensive setup to offensive action when race situation changes rapidly (crosswinds to climbs).
key_patterns: Tempo grinding strategy targeting specific time gaps rather than explosive attacks (2 instances)
Pace control immediately neutralized by explosive counterattacks from rivals (2 instances)
Defensive positioning in tactical moments but poor conversion to offense (2 instances)
form_trajectory: negative: controlled pace repeatedly neutralized by more explosive rivals; tactical rigidity showing vulnerability
